eas.name: Omnicor
eas.title: The Wealth Compounder
eas.tagline: Set it on the world's most liquid pair and let it compound.
eas.framingNote: Reflects 5-year compounding under aggressive parameters in backtest conditions. A verified Max Drawdown for this configuration is not yet published — weigh it against the Profit Factor of 3.65 and the live track record on Myfxbook.

eas.name: Cenith
eas.title: The Conservative Shield
eas.setFilesNote: No set files — strict M5 default
eas.tagline: Built around what it refuses to lose.

eas.name: Golden
eas.title: The Beast Tamer
eas.setFilesNote: Set files required — two, one per timeframe
eas.tagline: Engineered for the chaos gold makes its home.
eas.framingNote: For context, institutional gold strategies typically sit around 1.3–1.5 Profit Factor. A verified Max Drawdown is not yet published — weigh this against the Profit Factor of 1.87 and the live track record on Myfxbook.
